  -- and the category of Types.

    F := fun _ => Unit
    homF := fun _ => fun _ => ()
    map_id := fun _ => by funext; rfl

    obtain ⟨⟨_, g, _, _⟩, _⟩ := h
    exact Nat.not_succ_le_zero 0 g.down
  · -- Prove F(0 ≤ 1) is an isomorphism (identity on Unit)
    rw [iso_iff_isIso]
    use { hom := fun _ => (), inv := fun _ => (), hom_inv_id := by funext ⟨⟩; rfl, inv_hom_id := by funext ⟨⟩; rfl }
